summary: Shopping Trip Route Planner feature testing complete - Backend API and Frontend UI fully functional. 14/14 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopping trip route planner fully implemented and tested. Backend: POST /api/routes/shopping_trip accepts store_names array and returns optimized route with stops, legs, distances, travel times, and SVG coordinates. Frontend: Shopping List button in loadout builder opens modal with total cost, store groupings, and visual SVG route map showing numbered stops and dashed route lines.

backend_features: Multi-stop route optimization using nearest-neighbor algorithm
Fuzzy store name to location resolution (e.g. 'Centermass @ Area 18' -> Area 18)
Different QD sizes affect travel time calculation
Returns SVG coordinates (map_x, map_y) for all stops and legs
Returns context_locations for background map rendering
frontend_features: Shopping List button in builder view (after equipping items)
Shopping List button on saved loadouts (Cost button)
Visual Route Map SVG with numbered stops and dashed route lines
Route legs show distance (Mkm) and travel time
Shopping Route groups items by store (fewest stops)
Full Breakdown shows each item with location and price
test_scenarios_verified: Create new loadout -> equip items -> shopping list
Save loadout -> view saved loadouts -> shopping list from saved
Multi-store items show route map with legs
Single-store items show single stop (0 Mkm)
